text:
🖥️ {{VM_Details.data?.vm_info?.name || (Get_Metadata_Provisioning.data?.[0] ? 'Provisioning...' : 'Unknown VM')}}

Virtual Machine Details

Power Status {{VM_Details.data?.vm_info?.state === 'poweredOn' ? '🟢 Powered On' : (VM_Details.data?.vm_info?.state ? '🔴 ' + VM_Details.data.vm_info.state : (Get_Metadata_Provisioning.data?.[0] ? '⏳ Provisioning' : 'Unknown'))}}
Guest OS {{VM_Details.data?.vm_info?.os || Get_Metadata_Provisioning.data?.[0]?.template || 'Unknown'}}
IP Address {{VM_Details.data?.vm_info?.ip_address || (Get_Metadata_Provisioning.data?.[0] ? 'Waiting for DHCP...' : 'Unknown')}}
Owner {{Get_Metadata.data?.[0]?.owner || Get_Metadata_Provisioning.data?.[0]?.owner || 'N/A'}}
Created {{Get_Metadata.data?.[0]?.creation_date ? moment(Get_Metadata.data[0].creation_date).format('YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm') : (Get_Metadata_Provisioning.data?.[0]?.creation_date ? moment(Get_Metadata_Provisioning.data[0].creation_date).format('YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm') : 'N/A')}}
Shutdown {{Get_Metadata.data?.[0]?.shutdown_date ? moment(Get_Metadata.data[0].shutdown_date).format('YYYY-MM-DD') : (Get_Metadata_Provisioning.data?.[0]?.shutdown_date ? moment(Get_Metadata_Provisioning.data[0].shutdown_date).format('YYYY-MM-DD') : 'N/A')}}
Deletion {{Get_Metadata.data?.[0]?.deletion_date ? moment(Get_Metadata.data[0].deletion_date).format('YYYY-MM-DD') : (Get_Metadata_Provisioning.data?.[0]?.deletion_date ? moment(Get_Metadata_Provisioning.data[0].deletion_date).format('YYYY-MM-DD') : 'N/A')}}

VM Hardware

{{VM_Details.data?.vm_info?.disks?.map((d, i) => '').join('') || (Get_Metadata_Provisioning.data?.[0]?.disk ? '' : '')}} {{VM_Details.data?.vm_info?.networks?.map((n, i) => '').join('') || (Get_Metadata_Provisioning.data?.[0]?.network ? '' : '')}}
CPU {{VM_Details.data?.vm_info?.cpu_count || Get_Metadata_Provisioning.data?.[0]?.cpu || 0}} vCPU
Memory {{VM_Details.data?.vm_info?.ram_gb || (Get_Metadata_Provisioning.data?.[0]?.ram ? (Get_Metadata_Provisioning.data[0].ram / 1024).toFixed(1) : 0)}} GB
Disk ' + (i+1) + '' + d.capacity_gb + ' GB
Disk 1' + Get_Metadata_Provisioning.data[0].disk + ' GB
Network ' + (i+1) + '' + n.name + '
Network 1' + Get_Metadata_Provisioning.data[0].network + '

Related Objects

ESXi Host {{VM_Details.data?.vm_info?.host || (Get_Metadata_Provisioning.data?.[0] ? 'Pending Assignment' : 'Unknown')}}
Folder {{VM_Details.data?.vm_info?.folder || Get_Metadata_Provisioning.data?.[0]?.folder || 'Unknown'}}
MOID {{VM_Details.data?.vm_info?.moid || (Get_Metadata_Provisioning.data?.[0] ? 'Provisioning...' : 'Unknown')}}
